user_task_description: This resume document opens with an unwanted blank first page before the actual content begins.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Delete the blank first page while keeping the rest of the resume content intact.
atomic_scope: Only deletion of the unwanted blank page is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A corrected .docx document with no blank opening page.

inspired_by.title: How do you delete a blank first page??

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- Fonts and section styling are inconsistent
- Spacing is slightly uneven across sections
- Footer page numbering may need review, but that is not the explicit request
